notes: Data-present acceptance run (2026-06-14): the phase4_specA_v1 classifier spec was executed on real ETH/USDT 5m OHLCV (210,528 bars, 2024-01-01..2025-12-31) from the source_data_paths file. Data-quality PASS (0 duplicate/gap/OHLC violations; 21 zero-volume + 9 spike bars documented, retained). regime_labels.csv generated (causal; 301 warmup rows, 210,227 labeled; distribution range 44.6% / strong_down 20.2% / strong_up 18.8% / volatile 11.8% / transition 4.5%). All acceptance tests PASS (unit, slice-invariance 40/40, warmup/boundary). causal-auditor returned PASS on BOTH the spec and the realized labels + implementation. SPEC.md not required (the methodology design phase used the regime-classification skill as the canonical source by design). research_db read-only and not used (file-based per skill section 16). The market-regime repo is under git; labels were generated against commit 6a721f5. llm_discretion_used=false; no Phase 2/3 artifact read; no DB write. Effective warmup is 301 bars (volatility_score needs 288 ATR values); the implemented ATR percentile uses pandas rolling rank(pct=True), the canonical convention for phase4_specA_v1 (the (count-1)/(len-1) form is illustrative; both strictly trailing). Stage B (future-regime prediction) research design completed after Stage A (regime_prediction_research.md, regime_prediction_label_spec.md, regime_prediction_validation_plan.md): design-only (no model trained/validated); auxiliary/probabilistic, never a current-regime label and never replaces the causal classifier. Reproducibility: build_regime_labels.py (argparse --input/--outdir/--git-commit/--source-data-path-label) regenerates regime_labels.csv and auto-writes provenance.json; the source_data_path column stores a machine-independent label (ETHUSDT_futures_5min.csv) so output is byte-identical across machines (sha256 1b6e128c...). validate_regime_labels.py re-runs the full test suite (17 tests, all PASS) into validation_results.md. Labels generated against commit 6a721f5; provenance.json records input/output sha256 + lib versions; git history records the generator/labels commits.
